ModuleTitle.helper: Used by OpenContent to sync with the DNN module title. This does not display to site visitors.

ModuleAnchor.helper: Optional. Use only letters, numbers, and hyphens if you want to link directly to this section from elsewhere on the page.

Heading.helper: Optional. Main heading shown beside the image. HTML is allowed.

Quote.helper: Optional. Short highlighted quote shown beneath the heading. HTML is allowed.

Description.helper: Optional. Main descriptive text shown beneath the quote. HTML is allowed.
Description.placeholder: Use this area for a short profile, introduction, or credibility statement.

Image.helper: Required. Use a square or near-square portrait image for the best crop. Recommended minimum size: 800px by 800px. Larger is fine.

ImageLink.helper: Optional. If added, the portrait image becomes clickable.

SocialProof.helper: Optional. Add short proof points or credentials. They display as pill-style badges.

Title.helper: Required. Keep this short for the best layout. HTML is allowed.
